TRAP.title: Trap
TRAP.description: Attack damage taken is increased by 100%.
SHINE.title: Shine
SHINE.description: Affects cards with Shine. Adds value equal to your Shine.
REVENGE.title: Revenge
REVENGE.description: Affects cards with Shine. Multiplies card values by your Revenge, and playing a Shine card costs HP equal to your Revenge.
PLAN_COST.title: Plan
RUMOR.title: Rumor
RUMOR.description: Each stack increases attack damage taken by 10%.
ESCAPE.title: Escape
ESCAPE.description: Attack damage taken is reduced by 50%.
